Bash(curl -s http://localhost:6006/api/v1/train/status/ffcab142 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('status:', d['status'], '| total lines:', len\(d['log_tail']\)\)
print\('=== last 30 lines ==='\)
for l in d['log_tail'][-30:]:

")
